title: Health Educator
description: The CDC is the nation's premier public health institute, protecting Americans from infectious diseases, environmental hazards, and health threats. You'll develop and deliver health education programs impacting millions.
responsibilities: Develop and deliver health education programs on disease prevention
Create educational materials for diverse audiences
Track program participation and health outcomes
Partner with community organizations to reach target populations
Evaluate program effectiveness and recommend improvements
Support surveillance and data collection efforts

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Public Health, Health Education, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of health education or community health experience
certifications: CHES (Certified Health Education Specialist) or pursuing

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
